mapper.sql: select region_id, region_name, province, center_lat, center_lng, is_active, sort_order, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from bh_region
mapper.select: order by sort_order asc, region_id asc
select region_id as `value`, region_name as `label` from bh_region where is_active = 1 order by sort_order asc, region_id asc
